title: Easy Crouch Toggle
body:
Do you find yourself going into the settings menu to turn on Crouch Toggle a lot? No..? Well too bad! Now you can set a dedicated keybind to toggle crouch instead of going to the settings everytime!

Default keybind is 'c' (Can be changed in the Keybind menu)

To un-crouch.. just press your normal crouch button 👍
